chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P.No.S-891 of 2023 Date Order with signature of the Judge 1. For hearing of MA 6397/2024, 2. For hearing of main case. 23.09.2024. Mr. K. Jehangir, advocate for petitioner Mr. Iftikhar Javed Qazi, advocate for respondent = Learned counsel for petitioner after arguing the case at some length submits that if three months’ time is granted to the petitioner to vacate the premises viz. Double Storey Bungalow No.43/1, 19th Lane, Off Khayaban- e-Badban, Phase-VII, measuring 600 Sq. Yds, situated in DHA, Karachi, he would not press this petition. Learned counsel for landlord/respondent has graciously acceded to this proposal. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed. The petitioner can retain the demised premises for three months from today subject to payment of rent and all other dues. However, on expiry of three months or before that, he shall vacate the premises without further notice. On his failure, the executing court shall issue writ of possession with police aid without further notice. The petition is dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed application in the above terms. JUDGE A.K
